header: The release notes tool teams actually trust
subheadline: Desiderio turns merged pull requests into clear, on-brand changelogs, so product and support stay in sync without the copy-paste.
quote: We cut changelog prep from two days a release to under an hour, and support tickets about “what changed” dropped by 40%. It is the first tool our whole product team adopted without being asked.
